title: [App] Flamingo - Connect headset already paired with charge case
scenario: Headset paired with charge case shows dual battery indicators and firmware update info for both devices in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Ensure the headset is already paired with its charge case (out of box state).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. On the Home screen, tap the '+' or 'Add Device' button to begin pairing.
4. Put the headset (still in the charge case) into pairing mode by pressing and holding the Bluetooth button on the charge case.
5. Select the headset from the list of available devices in the app.
6. Wait for the pairing to complete.
7. Observe the Home screen for battery indicators.
8. Navigate to Settings → Software Update (or Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update).
9. Check if the 'Update all' button is present when a firmware update is available.
10. Verify that firmware info for both the headset and the charge case is displayed.
expected: 1. The headset pairs successfully with the Poly Studio Mobile app. 2. Two battery indicators (one for the headset, one for the charge case) appear on the Home screen. 3. In Settings > Software Update, the "Update all" button is present if a firmware update is available. 4. Firmware version info for both the headset and the charge case is displayed.
